clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation patterns across salience and limbic structures (such as the amygdala and anterior insula), reflecting the broad macroscopic axis of processing valenced states, emotional reactivity, and mood.

Anchored by co-activation within the ventral striatum and ventromedial prefrontal cortex, these concepts converge on the high-level domain of computing stimulus worth to guide choices and motivated behavior.

These terms strongly co-activate within the core default mode network (e.g., medial prefrontal cortex, precuneus, TPJ), representing the broad functional domain of generating internally directed representations of oneself and other abstract agents.
